meanings.definition: make dull or stupid or muddle with drunkenness or infatuation
be a mystery or bewildering to
examples: Got me--I don't know the answer!

meanings.definition: make senseless or dizzy by or as if by a blow
so surprisingly impressive as to stun or overwhelm
examples: such an enormous response was astonishing
the amount of money required was staggering
the figure inside the boucle dress was stupefying

meanings.definition: making physically stupid or dull or insensible
examples: a stupefying blow to the head
the stupefying impact of the tragedy
